caption: In a room with brick walls and a tiled floor, a man and several children are gathered around a large, blue rectangular chest. The man, dressed in a light-colored button-down shirt and khaki trousers, stands with his back to the viewer, leaning over the chest. Around the chest, several children are seated on the floor; some wear reddish-brown shirts. In the background, there is a black screen and shelves filled with books and folders. The scene remains static across the frames, with the people maintaining their positions. At the bottom of the image, white on-screen text reads, "These children will help the Congo." The composition depicts a quiet, focused moment in what appears to be a classroom or community center setting.
